dc3_gap_analysis: igt-dc3-gap-analysis.md written at C110. R1 gap: (a) reference computation — TMS analog, agreed canonical circuit (modular arithmetic candidate); (b) formal specification language — FSC analog, machine-checkable circuit claims; (c) cross-tool calibration metric. R3 gap: (a) mandatory deposition registry — wwPDB analog; (b) career structure for failure detection — Scholze-Stix analog. Cryo-EM trajectory as structural precedent: Phase 1 (high OA-DoF, expert visual) → Phase 2 (FSC metric, contested threshold) → Phase 3 (gold-standard FSC + mandatory EMDB = near-zero OA-DoF). AI interpretability currently Phase 1/early Phase 2. R1a ~2-5 years; full DC#3 ~10-15 years. DC#3 full is achievable — not principled impossibility.
cryo_em_trajectory_insight: The Phase 2→3 transition in cryo-EM required not just the formal metric (FSC) but: agreed threshold (0.143 not 0.5) + mandatory institutional enforcement (EMDB deposition as journal requirement). The metric alone does not achieve near-zero OA-DoF — institutional enforcement completes the transition. Pattern holds across NMR (BMRB mandatory 2010), geochronology (EARTHTIME), and cryo-EM (EMDB). Institutions are the enforcement mechanism, not researcher virtue.
